cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out where this passage about the London Eye comes from. The options are a magazine, newspaper, guidebook, or a website. It also includes some architectural background from David Marks and Julia Barfield, and ends with a suggestion to refer to a homepage for other attractions.
